prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 75, title Lord of Ruins
Scene/background: colossal ruined throne hall collapsing into a supernatural storm abyss, ancient pillars, drifting debris, distant fire and lightning
Subject: massive imposing dark sovereign mage, central figure, heavier armor, shattered crown, spectral ruin-energy wings or torn magical mantle, commanding destruction with both hands
Style/medium: premium epic fantasy game art, dramatic, high-detail, stylized realism, polished for mobile splash screens
Composition/framing: centered dominant figure, square image, broad silhouette, depth behind the character, clear layering from foreground shards to background ruins
Lighting/mood: apocalyptic, powerful, tyrannical, intense violet and ember light, heavy atmosphere
Color palette: black steel, dark amethyst, ruined stone gray, ember orange accents, electric violet core light
Materials/textures: broken stone, rune shards, scarred armor, smoke, charged dust
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no decorative border, no secondary hero character, focus on scale and authority
